# BP-66 negative variant: direct comparison is against nil, not a wrapped sentinel.
lang: go
file: BP-66-variant-safe.go
variant: nil-comparison
---
package sample

import "fmt"

func load() error {
	wrapped := fmt.Errorf("load failed: %w", fmt.Errorf("inner"))
	if wrapped != nil {
		return fmt.Errorf("load failed: %w", wrapped)
	}
	return nil
}
